case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY AND THROUGH VS. BUTLER ENTERPRISE GROUP, LLC

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY AND THROUGH SAN FRANCISCO PORT COMMISSION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTLER ENTERPRISE GROUP, LLC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 601 CEASAR CHAVEZ STREET, S.F.
